product.title: Product
product.description: Represents a footwear item or fashion accessory in the store inventory.

price.description: Price of the product in Nigerian Naira (NGN).

images.description: List of WebP/optimized image URLs for the product gallery.

category.description: Category ID this product belongs to.

featured.description: Whether the product should be highlighted on the home page.

category.title: Category
category.description: Represents a grouping of products (e.g., Sneakers, Heels).

image.description: Cover image URL for the category banner.

productCount.description: Pre-calculated count of active products to optimize speed.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Global store and contact details, business hours, and social media links.

whatsappNumber.description: WhatsApp contact number in active format (e.g., +234...).

admin.title: Admin
admin.description: Internal record of users who are authorized store administrators.

vendor.title: Vendor
vendor.description: Stall owner contact preferences and identity properties.

whatsapp.description: The custom WhatsApp contact number used for trade inquiries.

/categories/{categoryId}.description: Categories for fast sorting and mobile browsing.

/settings/{settingsId}.description: Global shop configuration, address, social media links.

/admins/{adminId}.description: Allowed administrator users for Dashboard access.

/vendors/{vendorId}.description: Allowed vendors with their WhatsApp number linkages.
